title: Settings: Message Frame
text: Settings: Message Frame Specify whether the clrmess ProcScript instruction is enabled or disabled, and whether application messages are sent to the application's message frame or to the application's transcript window. Fields ProcScript instruction clrmess Send messages to Related Links Settings: I/O Print Choose the level of I/O messages that are displayed in the message frame or transcript window. Settings: Triggers Choose the triggers you want to be enabled or disabled for debugging, or those that you want to be set as breakpoints. Settings: Tracing Choose the level or type of ProcScript-related tracing to be displayed in the message frame or transcript window. Settings: Errors Set a specific ProcScript error value ($procerror) as a breakpoint. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
